_metadata.description: Controlled vocabulary for the 22 clinical-indication categories used in backed_clinical_studies.json. Drives evidence grouping in the Flutter UI (e.g. 'Cardiovascular evidence' badge on the product detail screen) and links to related condition_ids for context-relevant scoring boosts.
_metadata.purpose: Single source of truth for clinical-indication labels and descriptions. Categorizes the 197 entries in backed_clinical_studies.json into 22 buckets for grouping evidence in the UI.
_metadata.alignment: Pipeline source: scripts/data/backed_clinical_studies.json `category` field (197 entries, 22 distinct values verified 2026-05-01).

field_contract.name: User-facing label.
field_contract.notes: ≤200-char plain-English description shown in tap-to-learn modal.
field_contract.related_condition_ids: Optional. Conditions (from condition_vocab) commonly served by ingredients in this category.
field_contract.examples: Up to 5 ingredient names users might recognize as evidence-bearing for this indication.

clinical_indications.name: Stress & Adaptogens
clinical_indications.notes: Botanicals and nutrients shown to modulate the stress response and HPA axis. Often used to improve resilience and reduce perceived stress.

clinical_indications.name: Healthy Aging & Longevity
clinical_indications.notes: Compounds with evidence for cellular and metabolic resilience over time. Often touted for healthspan.

clinical_indications.name: Anti-Inflammatory
clinical_indications.notes: Ingredients with evidence for reducing systemic or localized inflammation (CRP, IL-6, joint markers).

clinical_indications.name: Antioxidants
clinical_indications.notes: Compounds that scavenge reactive oxygen species or upregulate endogenous antioxidant pathways (Nrf2).

clinical_indications.name: Cardiovascular & Heart Health
clinical_indications.notes: Evidence for blood pressure, lipid panel, vascular function, or cardiac event reduction.

clinical_indications.name: Cognitive & Neurological
clinical_indications.notes: Evidence for attention, memory, processing speed, or neuroprotection.

clinical_indications.name: Digestive & Gut Health
clinical_indications.notes: Evidence for GI symptom relief, gut motility, microbiome diversity, or barrier function.

clinical_indications.name: Eye & Vision
clinical_indications.notes: Evidence for macular pigment optical density, dry-eye symptoms, or age-related vision changes.

clinical_indications.name: General Herbal
clinical_indications.notes: Broad-action herbal ingredients without a single dominant indication. Used as catch-all bucket for botanicals with general wellness evidence.

clinical_indications.name: Hormonal & Endocrine
clinical_indications.notes: Evidence for hormone modulation (thyroid, sex hormones, cortisol). Use with provider awareness.

clinical_indications.name: Immune Support
clinical_indications.notes: Evidence for immune-cell function, infection-duration reduction, or vaccine-response support.

clinical_indications.name: Joint & Bone
clinical_indications.notes: Evidence for joint comfort, range of motion, cartilage health, and bone density.

clinical_indications.name: Liver & Detoxification
clinical_indications.notes: Evidence for hepatic enzyme support, glutathione production, or phase I/II detox pathways.

clinical_indications.name: Metabolic & Blood Sugar
clinical_indications.notes: Evidence for fasting glucose, HbA1c, insulin sensitivity, or metabolic syndrome markers.

clinical_indications.name: Mineral Supplementation
clinical_indications.notes: Evidence for correcting mineral deficiencies and downstream functional outcomes.

clinical_indications.name: Mitochondrial & Energy
clinical_indications.notes: Evidence for ATP production, mitochondrial biogenesis, or fatigue reduction.

clinical_indications.name: Probiotic Strains
clinical_indications.notes: Strain-specific clinical evidence (strain identity is essential for evidence transfer).

clinical_indications.name: Skin, Hair & Collagen
clinical_indications.notes: Evidence for skin elasticity, hydration, hair density, and nail strength.

clinical_indications.name: Sleep & Mood
clinical_indications.notes: Evidence for sleep onset/depth/duration and mood-state outcomes (depression, anxiety scales).

clinical_indications.name: Sports Performance
clinical_indications.notes: Evidence for power output, endurance, recovery, or training adaptation in athletes.

clinical_indications.name: Urinary & Genitourinary
clinical_indications.notes: Evidence for urinary tract symptoms, prostate health, and bladder function.

clinical_indications.name: Vitamin Supplementation
clinical_indications.notes: Evidence for correcting vitamin deficiencies and downstream functional outcomes.
